body.title: GrannyDaemon: escalation pattern tracker (PA2.0 Layer 1→2)
body.result: VALIDATED: PatternTracker ships with PATTERN_REPORT + per-tag DONE/ESCALATE rates; 22+ tests pass
body.description:
GrannyDaemon dispatches tickets but accumulates no signal about which classes of tickets succeed or fail. This is the PA2.0 Layer 1→2 gap: we observe (MINION_RESULT posts) but don't discover relationships ('Platform/M/worker tier escalates 80% of the time').

Add a PatternTracker to GrannyDaemon that:
1. Receives outcome signal after each inference_dispatch_fn call (DONE / ESCALATE / BLOCKED / REPROMPT / UPGRADE / CONFUSED + tag, task_class, size)
2. Aggregates rate by tag, task_class (tier), and size
3. Persists to flat-file JSONL at ~/.granny/patterns.jsonl (append-only, no SQLite)
4. Posts a PATTERN_REPORT to shared channel every N=50 dispatches (GRANNY_PATTERN_REPORT_INTERVAL env var)
5. Exposes pattern_summary() → dict for context-load integration

**Affected files:** devices/granny/daemon.py, new devices/granny/pattern_tracker.py, tests/test_granny_inference_dispatch.py
**Design rules:** no-sqlite (flat JSONL only); log at INFO; no-hardcoded-instance-refs per AR-004
**Scope boundary:** Tracking and reporting only. Out of scope: automatically updating rules_engine routing from patterns (that is T-inference-outcome-learner in D3).
**Completion criteria:** `.venv/bin/pytest tests/ -q -k pattern` passes; after 5 simulated dispatches PatternTracker.pattern_summary() returns a dict with per-tag DONE/ESCALATE rates; PATTERN_REPORT string appears in a channel post after N dispatches in integration test
